name: Marcus T.
text: Great breakdown on tax-loss harvesting. I started using this last year and saved about $3k in taxes on my index funds. Wish I'd known about it sooner.

name: Jennifer M.
text: Can someone explain the wash sale rule in simpler terms? I'm worried I might be accidentally triggering it with my monthly rebalancing.

name: David R.
text: Hold up, most people ignore these because their brokers don't make it easy. The tools exist but they're buried in settings nobody checks.

name: Sarah K.
text: Using a taxable account with high dividend stocks while keeping growth in my Roth has cut my effective tax rate significantly. This article nails it.

name: Robert P.
text: Question: does asset location strategy still work if you're not maxing out your retirement accounts first? Or is that putting the cart before the horse?
